message:
fix: address Copilot review comments on NPS survey (#5276)

- Validate daysSince() against NaN from corrupted localStorage dates
- Validate score range (1-4) in submitResponse, reject out-of-range
- Enforce backend min description length (20 chars) before API call
- Map passive category to feedbackNeutral prompt (not feedbackNegative)
- Clean up thank-you setTimeout on unmount to prevent state leak

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
